ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "rule" TEXT /* The rule that triggered the issue */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the issue */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., CODE_SMELL, BUG, VULNERABILITY) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., MINOR, MAJOR, CRITICAL) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language in which the issue was detected */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the issue is located */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file where the issue is located */,
  "effort" TEXT /* Estimated effort required to fix the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., OPEN, RESOLVED, IN_PROGRESS) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the issue belongs to */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the developer assigned to the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was last updated */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the developer who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project lead */,
  "repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "ci_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CI pipeline associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_ci_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("ci_pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_pipelines ("ci_pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project lead, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was assigned */,
  "unassigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was unassigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_pipelines" (
  "ci_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CI pipeline */,
  "ci_pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the CI pipeline */,
  "ci_pipeline_type" TEXT /* Type of the CI pipeline (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ci_pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue being labeled */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the project member (e.g., developer, project lead) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of open issues */,
  "resolved_issues" INTEGER /* Number of resolved issues */,
  "effort_required" INTEGER /* Total effort required to resolve issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
